title: LegacyPlus
body:
Legacy Plus: Reviving Classic Minecraft with a Twist

Have you ever wanted to play Minecraft Legacy but thought it was too boring?

Look no further than Legacy Plus. This modpack has everything you need!

Playing this modpack will change how you think when it comes to playing Minecraft for good!

 

QoL Updates

Better Chests

Updated End Structures

An Overworld Expansion

Something That Watches You Without You Noticing

And So Much More

 

Like what you see? Then download Legacy Plus today!
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat
